seoTitle: Glen Fergus vs Glen Martin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Fergus and Glen Martin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Fergus vs Glen Martin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Fergus and Glen Martin.
heading: Glen Fergus vs Glen Martin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Fergus, New South Wales and Glen Martin, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Fergus has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Glen Martin (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Fergus or Glen Martin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Fergus has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Glen Martin scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Fergus scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Martin scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Fergus or Glen Martin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Fergus has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
